---
title: "OpenTripPlanner for R"
description: "Malcolm Morgan, Marcus Young, Robin Lovelace, and Layik Hama (2019). OpenTripPlanner for R. *Journal of Open Source Software*. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01926"
date: "2019-12-02"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "morgan_opentripplanner_2019"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Journal of Open Source Software"
doi: "10.21105/joss.01926"
publication-url: "https://joss.theoj.org/papers/10.21105/joss.01926"
authors:
  - "Malcolm Morgan"
  - "Marcus Young"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Layik Hama"
abstract: "Morgan et al., (2019). OpenTripPlanner for R. Journal of Open Source Software, 4(44), 1926, https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01926"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Journal of Open Source Software
**Year:** 2019

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01926) [Publisher Link](https://joss.theoj.org/papers/10.21105/joss.01926) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

Morgan et al., (2019). OpenTripPlanner for R. Journal of Open Source Software, 4(44), 1926, https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01926

## Citation

Malcolm Morgan, Marcus Young, Robin Lovelace, and Layik Hama (2019). OpenTripPlanner for R. *Journal of Open Source Software*. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01926

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{morgan_opentripplanner_2019,
  title = {{{OpenTripPlanner}} for {{R}}},
  author = {Morgan, Malcolm and Young, Marcus and Lovelace, Robin and Hama, Layik},
  date = {2019-12-02},
  journaltitle = {Journal of Open Source Software},
  volume = {4},
  number = {44},
  pages = {1926},
  issn = {2475-9066},
  doi = {10.21105/joss.01926},
  url = {https://joss.theoj.org/papers/10.21105/joss.01926},
  urldate = {2020-01-29},
  abstract = {Morgan et al., (2019). OpenTripPlanner for R. Journal of Open Source Software, 4(44), 1926, https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01926},
  langid = {english},
  annotation = {ZSCC: 0000000},
  file = {/home/robin/Zotero/storage/4SLLZ5YE/Morgan et al. - 2019 - OpenTripPlanner for R.pdf}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
